subtopics.title: Introduction to Visual Arts
common_misconceptions: Art is not a real subject
Only talented people can do art
subtopics.teaching_note: Visual arts: art forms you can see. Drawing: using pencils, charcoal, crayons. Painting: using watercolour, oil paint, acrylic. Sculpture: 3D art (clay, wood, metal). Crafts: functional art (basket weaving, bead making, tie-dye). Nigerian traditional arts: Adire (Yoruba tie-dye), Akwete (Igbo weaving), Uli (Igbo body/wall painting), Nok terracotta (ancient sculpture), Benin bronzes. Everyone can learn art - practice improves skill.
